html:
2026-0299
2026-03-30IRCC, TBFinancial Administration ActFees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 2Fees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 2 in order to remit outstanding debts resulting from the non-collection for eligible principal applicants and their accompanying family members whose applications were found ineligible under a temporary public policy.N/A
subject: Fees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 2
precis: Fees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 2 in order to remit outstanding debts resulting from the non-collection for eligible principal applicants and their accompanying family members whose applications were found ineligible under a temporary public policy.
